---
title: "Cross-Validation Possibilities Based on the Nature of Data"
include-before-body:
  - text: <img src="resources/cover/main2.png" style="max-width:900px;width:100%">

author:
  - name: Pedro Sousa
    url: https://github.com/pedrosousaINE
    email: pedro.sousa@ine.pt
  - name: Vasco Cordeiro 
    url: https://github.com/vascoandre
    email: vasco.cordeiro@ine.pt
  - name:  Sónia Quaresma 
    url:https://github.com/SoniaQuaresma
    email: sonia.quaresma@ine.pt

date: today

description: |
  This training material provides an overview of cross-validation strategies and explains how different validation approaches should be chosen depending on the structure of the data. It highlights why cross-validation is not universal and how improper splitting can lead to misleading model evaluation results.

tags:
  - Cross-Validation
  - Model Evaluation
  - Machine Learning
  - Resampling Methods
  - Statistical Learning

image: "https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcQY-OenRMvFyZUfDm_snUCxpV4SyaHvUeqObA&s"

duration: "90"

skills:
  - Model Evaluation
  - Cross-Validation Techniques
  - Statistical Learning
  - Machine Learning Fundamentals

courseMaterial:
  - R Scripts
  - R Markdown Notebooks

publicLevel:
  - Beginner
  - Intermediate

resourceLanguage:
  - R

suggestedBefore:
  - https://quarto.org/
  - https://juba.github.io/tidyverse/

deploymentURL:
  - rstudio:
      - "https://datalab.sspcloud.fr/launcher/ide/rstudio-sparkr"
  - jupyter:
      - "https://datalab.sspcloud.fr/launcher/ide/jupyter-python"
  - vscode:
      - en: "https://datalab.sspcloud.fr/launcher/ide/vscode-python"

suggestedRequirements:
  - "https://cran.r-project.org/"
  - "https://www.tidymodels.org/"
  - "https://rsample.tidymodels.org/"
  - "https://yardstick.tidymodels.org/"
  - "https://quarto.org/"

gsbpm: "5.1"
---
